task: Parse an AWS S3 object key to extract the bucket name, folder path, and file name from a full S3 URI like 's3://my-bucket/folder/subfolder/file.txt'
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS Lambda function resource with basic properties including function name, runtime, and IAM role ARN
Write a Python function that takes an AWS CloudWatch log timestamp in milliseconds since epoch and converts it to a human-readable ISO 8601 format string
